creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
On Mon, Jan 08, 2001 at 08:23:57AM -0000, Dan Peterson wrote:
> 
> >Number:         24144
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       Update port net/djbdns to version 1.03
> >Originator:     Dan Peterson
> 
> >Fix:
> 
> diff -urN djbdns.orig/Makefile djbdns/Makefile
> --- djbdns.orig/Makefile	Mon Jan  8 00:06:41 2001
> +++ djbdns/Makefile	Mon Jan  8 00:11:56 2001
> @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
>  #
>  
>  PORTNAME=	djbdns
> -PORTVERSION=	1.02
> +PORTVERSION=	1.03
>  CATEGORIES=	net
>  MASTER_SITES=	http://cr.yp.to/djbdns/ \
>  		ftp://cr.yp.to/djbdns/
> diff -urN djbdns.orig/distinfo djbdns/distinfo
> --- djbdns.orig/distinfo	Mon Jan  8 00:06:41 2001
> +++ djbdns/distinfo	Mon Jan  8 00:11:56 2001
> @@ -1 +1 @@
> -MD5 (djbdns-1.02.tar.gz) = c27b7ffd4af1c93db96f40f6d5f793b6
> +MD5 (djbdns-1.03.tar.gz) = d756ecca7aa5a0384860eee074f8c3fa
> diff -urN djbdns.orig/files/patch-aa djbdns/files/patch-aa
> --- djbdns.orig/files/patch-aa	Mon Jan  8 00:06:41 2001
> +++ djbdns/files/patch-aa	Mon Jan  8 00:11:56 2001

[snip regenerating the two patchfiles with only dates differing]

Is there really a reason to regenerate this patch and the following
one?  I can see no changes at all..

[snip semantical sorting of pkg-plist]

Hmm.. many people would prefer that pkg-plist be alphabetically
sorted - easier to keep track of mistakenly entered doubles,
easier to regenerate semi-automatically..  In the end, I think
it's a matter of the port maintainer's preference.

The only change which I think is necessary in the pkg-plist
should be adding bin/dnstracesort.

I've attached a simpler patch that I had already sent to
the port maintainer - nbm@FreeBSD.org.

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
This sentence was in the past tense.

Index: ports/net/djbdns/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/net/djbdns/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.4
diff -u -r1.4 Makefile
--- ports/net/djbdns/Makefile	2000/09/28 18:18:41	1.4
+++ ports/net/djbdns/Makefile	2001/01/07 18:38:36
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	djbdns
-PORTVERSION=	1.02
+PORTVERSION=	1.03
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://cr.yp.to/djbdns/ \
 		ftp://cr.yp.to/djbdns/
Index: ports/net/djbdns/distinfo
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/net/djbdns/distinfo,v
retrieving revision 1.2
diff -u -r1.2 distinfo
--- ports/net/djbdns/distinfo	2000/09/28 18:19:05	1.2
+++ ports/net/djbdns/distinfo	2001/01/07 18:38:36
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (djbdns-1.02.tar.gz) = c27b7ffd4af1c93db96f40f6d5f793b6
+MD5 (djbdns-1.03.tar.gz) = d756ecca7aa5a0384860eee074f8c3fa
Index: ports/net/djbdns/pkg-plist
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/net/djbdns/pkg-plist,v
retrieving revision 1.2
diff -u -r1.2 pkg-plist
--- ports/net/djbdns/pkg-plist	2000/09/28 18:19:06	1.2
+++ ports/net/djbdns/pkg-plist	2001/01/07 18:38:36
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@
 bin/dnsq
 bin/dnsqr
 bin/dnstrace
+bin/dnstracesort
 bin/dnstxt
 bin/pickdns
 bin/pickdns-conf
